programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: It is high summer in the polar regions, and the sun never sets; many species take advantage of the easier conditions, but summer is a tough time for the polar bear family, as their ice world melts away and the cubs take their first swimming lesson.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough travels from the Arctic to the Antarctic to discover magical new ice worlds inhabited by the most extraordinary animal survivors on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The highlights from the series; a view of the entire polar year from winter through summer.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Polar landscapes in autumn are transformed as the big freeze returns; in the Arctic, polar bears gather in large numbers on the coast to wait for the return of the ice; off the coast 2,000 beluga whales head for a special estuary.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Winter is the greatest test for life in the polar regions; in the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth; out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the world's spectacled eider ducks braves the winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Human survival in polar areas relies on ancient wisdom and modern science; a look at the riches and wonders of the polar regions and the people that have been visiting them for thousands of years.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Spring in the polar regions; the greatest seasonal transformation of the planet begins with the return of the sun.

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: An earthy self-made man (Rodney Dangerfield) divorces his no-good wife and buys his way into his son's (Keith Gordon) college.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: A powerful swing convinces a hockey player he can join the PGA Tour and win back his grandmother's repossessed house.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland team's new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: Cleveland's new coach (Tom Berenger) whips his lackluster baseball players (Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) into winning shape.

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: An inspired Iowa farmer builds a baseball field, then sees

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: Cleveland's new coach (Tom Berenger) whips his lackluster baseball players (Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) into winning shape.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: Isolated for millions of years, Australia has a variety of unique animals, including the most dangerous bird in the world, kangaroos, wombats, koalas and predators.

programme.title: Back to School
programme.desc: An earthy self-made man (Rodney Dangerfield) divorces his no-good wife and buys his way into his son's (Keith Gordon) college.

programme.title: Happy Gilmore
programme.desc: A powerful swing convinces a hockey player he can join the PGA Tour and win back his grandmother's repossessed house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after running into his ex-wife and her new beau; when the brothers go shopping, they clash over what to buy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: The housekeeper's beautiful granddaughter comes to work with her and attracts the attention of the men; Alan tries to convince Judith that Charlie's house is good for Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie sets his ailing brother up on a date, then drags him to a steam room to help him get rid of his flu symptoms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie realizes he's broke when his credit card is declined at the grocery store. Richard Lewis guest stars.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Against Alan's judgment, Charlie falls for a seemingly crazy woman named Frankie. Guest star: Jenna Elfman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Frankie tells Charlie and Alan why she and her daughter are on the run; Frankie's daughter has a crush on Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by choosing harebrained cousins as Jake's guardians in the event of his death.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is stunned to learn his ex-girlfriend is now a man (Chris O'Donnell).

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz (guest star Teri Hatcher), hits on Alan at Jake's birthday party; Evelyn prefers alcohol to cake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: After trying a father/son talk, Alan and Judith decide to take a moody Jake to a therapist (Jane Lynch).

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland team's new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: The Outsiders
programme.desc: In the 1960s Oklahoma a sensitive youth gets in over his head when his best friend kills a member of a rival gang.

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: A boy (Wil Wheaton) and his three buddies set out in the summer of 1959 on a hike to find a dead body.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross must negotiate with an informant to get information about a missing couple and the main suspect in the disappearance.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a disabled teenage boy raises questions about whether a suspected killer was motivated by mercy or something more sinister.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Schiff's re-election may hinge on the stabbing death of a police officer; Briscoe's daughter is arrested for dealing drugs.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Curtis take on a double shooting case; McCoy and Ross prosecute the alleged gang rape of a girl with disabilities.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a well-known law professor is killed while being chased by a tabloid journalist, the victim's husband tries to keep family secrets out of the press.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Opponents of Adam Schiff question the handling of a sexual-assault case by the police and the D.A.'s office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation into a girl's death reveals secrets the adoptive family was desperately trying to hide.

programme.desc: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: An intense look into the unpredictable nature of traffic stops and the challenges officers face as they balance maintaining order with responding to unforeseen chaos.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Through police bodycam footage, viewers experience the intense moments of a burglary in progress, followed by high-speed chases, and the startling arrest of an officer for DUI.

programme.title: Full Throttle: The Steve Mcqueen Story
programme.desc: From troubled childhood and rebellious youth to meteoric rise as a Hollywood superstar, Steve McQueen's story is one of defiance and determination.

programme.title: King of Cool: The Dean Martin Story
programme.desc: Dean Martin was an undeniable singing, acting, and stage sensation. Newsmax celebrates the man behind the martini glass.

programme.title: Princes of the Palace
programme.desc: Exclusive interviews with biographers and commentators give an insider's view on the lives of Philip, Charles, William and Harry.

programme.title: Fame Kills: Princess Diana
programme.desc: Princess Diana's life was complicated, and it ended tragically; the fame and public admiration, although well-intentioned, is what ultimately killed her.

programme.title: Upheaval: The Journey of Menachem Begin
programme.desc: Imagery, rarely seen archival materials and interviews provide insight into the life and history of former Israeli Prime Minister Menachem Begin.

programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.desc: Dr. James Merritt desires to make the name of Jesus Christ known as well as to help empower Christians in their daily walk with God; Dr. Merritt's purpose remains to bring the lost to a personal encounter with Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: This lesson shows how to go to the Lord in prayer, asking for inner strength through the Holy Spirit to live out the life.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Dr. Robert Jeffress shares the Solomon Secret: To Succeed More, Fail More.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Rick Warren
programme.desc: Pastor Rick shares biblical truth and practical tools for living the full life God desires for everyone.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: It is vital for us to understand how to deal with self-deception, how to recognize it, what to do when it shows up and then how to stay out of it.

programme.title: PowerPoint With Jack Graham
programme.desc: Dr. Jack Graham glorifies God by spreading the word of Jesus Christ to make a positive impact on the world.

programme.title: It is Written with John Bradshaw
programme.desc: In the fourth chapter of Romans, Paul furthers his explanation of righteousness by faith using the example of Abraham to show how faith, salvation and works are connected.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: While we cannot know the day or hour of Christ's return, we can know it's close by the signs given in the Bible. God's Word not only tells us approximately when Jesus will return; it also tells us how. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: A woman who spent four years in a vegetative state discusses her miraculous healing, the far-reaching impact of her story and the residual effects of her trauma.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: This lesson shows how to go to the Lord in prayer, asking for inner strength through the Holy Spirit to live out the life.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Michael A. Youssef
programme.desc: Pastor Michael Youssef proclaims God's word to all the people around the world through the ministries of Leading The Way.

programme.title: Tim Timberlake
programme.desc: Tim Timberlake brings a message of hope and inspiration by going directly to God's Word, to provide solutions to life's toughest problems.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What is true righteousness? Today, Joyce explains the difference between self-righteousness and Godly righteousness and the freedom that can be gained by understanding the difference.

programme.title: Daniah Greenberg: Heritage
programme.desc: A look at a Bible translation that highlights the Hebrew roots of the Christian faith.

programme.title: PowerPoint With Jack Graham
programme.desc: Dr. Jack Graham glorifies God by spreading the word of Jesus Christ to make a positive impact on the world.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Pastor Joel Osteen shepherds the largest and fastest growing congregation in America, following in step with his father's lead when he founded Lakewood Church.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: This lesson shows how to go to the Lord in prayer, asking for inner strength through the Holy Spirit to live out the life.

programme.title: Real Life With Jack Hibbs
programme.desc: Pastor Jack is the founder and senior pastor of Calvary Chapel Chino Hills, one of America's fastest growing churches; he is also the president and founder of Real Life Ministries, a nationally syndicated radio and TV show.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: While we cannot know the day or hour of Christ's return, we can know it's close by the signs given in the Bible. God's Word not only tells us approximately when Jesus will return; it also tells us how. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Elmer Heinrich: Boosting Health with Immuno 150
programme.desc: Matt Crouch interviews Elmer Heinrich, the company President and CEO of Liquid Assets, about boosting health with Immuno 150.

programme.title: Wintley Phipps: A Symphonic Tribute
programme.desc: A night of music and ministry with Wintley Phipps as he joins Matt and Laurie to share timeless songs, powerful stories and a heartfelt reminder to shine the gifts God has placed within us.

programme.title: Christine Caine
programme.desc: Who and what people listen to can determine their very destiny, and clearly hearing what God is saying is a major key to experiencing His highest and best in life; from time to time, each person needs a little fine-tuning.

programme.title: Joseph Prince: Healing Scriptures
programme.desc: Joseph Prince clears up some erroneous views on healing, explaining that God wants people well and whole.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.desc: James Robison was a former preacher who changed directions in his life and began hosting this television show alongside his wife, Betty, in order to reach out to help more people.

programme.title: Ed Young: TBN Living Legacy
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch sit down with Dr. Ed Young, Sr. to discuss the importance of a living legacy and how to fulfill your purpose in a way that glorifies God.

programme.title: Elmer Heinrich: Boosting Health with Immuno 150
programme.desc: Matt Crouch interviews Elmer Heinrich, the company President and CEO of Liquid Assets, about boosting health with Immuno 150.

programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce explains how faith, gratitude and perspective can change the way you approach each day.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.

programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn't getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He's already given you what you need - and He'll help you work it in to what you're facing.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The new regional finals begin as ninjas from the western region compete for a spot in the national finals; the Tripleheader, a supersized three-lane racecourse, debuts as ninjas go head-to-head-to-head in side-by-side races.

programme.title: WNBA Pre-Show
programme.desc: Women's basketball experts weigh-in on the upcoming WNBA game.

programme.title: WNBA
programme.desc: The Fever and Aces meet for a WNBA regular-season basketball game at the Michelob ULTRA Arena. Indiana looks to repeat its recent 84-68 victory, leaning on guard Kelsey Mitchell following her 27-point display to challenge the host backcourt.

programme.title: Suits
programme.desc: Jessica does damage control in the wake of Harvey punching Louis, just as Jack Soloff and Daniel Hardman are looking for weaknesses to exploit.

programme.title: Deep Water Salvage
programme.desc: Capt. John Ward and his crew are called to raise a sunken houseboat near Pensacola, Fla.; the owner of the boat wants it back, but the current occupiers of the boat living in it don't want John's services; there've been reports of gunfire too.

programme.desc: Visiting the small mountain towns of western North Carolina and eastern Tennessee to explore their unique artisan culture.
